content.text: need to update ui so there will be new field on closing the field is certificate_number this certificate number will work like policy_number we will save it in closing as a text seperated with comma and will save the record aswell at new table call certificates with data certificate_number (policy_number + '00001') each certificate should be have running number base on it policy_number use @src/app/Services/SequenceNumberGenerator.php , policy_number (required), period_to, period_from, insurance_type (from the closing form)

content.thinking:
The user wants to update UI so there will be new field on closing: certificate_number. It works like policy_number: saved in closing as text separated with commas, and also saved as records in new table certificates with data certificate_number (policy_number + '00001') each certificate should have running number based on it policy_number using @src/app/Services/SequenceNumberGenerator.php , policy_number (required), period_to, period_from, insurance_type (from the closing form).

We need to implement UI changes and backend changes: new field certificate_number in closing form (probably similar to policy numbers). So need to add field in LeftForm.vue perhaps (policy & insured section). Also need to store in closing model (fillable, column). Also need new migration for certificates table and model, controller, DTO, etc. But user says "need to update ui so there will be new field on closing the field is certificate_number". Likely they just want UI changes. But also mention backend generation using SequenceNumberGenerator. So may need to add functionality to generate certificate numbers when saving closing.

We need to review current code for policy numbers handling: look at ClosingController and policies part. Let's explore repository.

content.text:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Services;

use App\Models\Transaction\SequenceNumber;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class SequenceNumberGenerator
{
    public const RESET_NONE = 'none';

    public const RESET_MONTHLY = 'monthly';

    public const RESET_YEARLY = 'yearly';

    public static function generate(
        string $class,
        string $code,
        int $leading_zero = 5,
        ?string $prefix = null,
        ?string $suffix = null,
        string $resetPeriod = self::RESET_MONTHLY
    ): string {
        return DB::transaction(function () use ($code, $class, $leading_zero, $prefix, $suffix, $resetPeriod): string {

            $period = self::getPeriod($resetPeriod);

            $sequence = SequenceNumber::query()
                ->where('sequenceable', $class)
                ->where('code', $code)
                ->where('year_month', $period)
                ->lockForUpdate()
                ->first();

            if (! $sequence) {
                $sequence = SequenceNumber::create([
                    'sequenceable' => $class,
                    'code' => $code,
                    'year_month' => $period,
                    'last_number' => 0,
                ]);
            }

            $sequence->increment('last_number');
            $return = mb_str_pad(
                (string) $sequence->last_number,
                $leading_zero,
                '0',
                STR_PAD_LEFT
            );

            if ($prefix) {
                $return = $prefix.$return;
            }

            if ($suffix) {
                $return = $return.$suffix;
            }

            return $return;
        });
    }

    private static function getPeriod(string $resetPeriod): string
    {
        return match ($resetPeriod) {
            self::RESET_YEARLY => now()->format('Y'),
            self::RESET_MONTHLY => now()->format('Ym'),
            default => '',
        };
    }
}

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed, nextTick, onMounted, reactive, ref, watch } from "vue";
import { helper } from "@/utils/helper";
import { usePage } from "@inertiajs/vue3";
import dayjs from 'dayjs'
import type { AccounExecutive, InsuranceType, Insured } from "@/types/master";
import type { ClosingFormData } from "@/types/closing";
import FormSwitch from "@/Components/Base/Form/FormSwitch";
import type { Validation, ValidationArgs } from "@vuelidate/core";
import type { UseAPIFormReturn } from "@/utils/useapiform";
import SimpleInput from "@/Components/SimpleInput.vue";
import { Dialog } from "@/Components/Base/Headless";
import Button from "@/Components/Base/Button";
import { FormLabel, FormInput } from "@/Components/Base/Form";
import Litepicker from "@/Components/Base/Litepicker";
import TomSelect from "@/Components/Base/TomSelect";
import API_SERVICE from "@/utils/apiservice";
import { policyApi } from "@/apis/policy.api";
import { constantApi } from "@/apis/constant.api";
import { useNotificationStore } from "@/stores/notification";
import Lucide from "@/Components/Base/Lucide";
import AutoCompleteInput from "@/Components/AutoCompleteInput.vue";

const notif = useNotificationStore();

const page = usePage();
const authTeams = (page.props as { auth: { teams: Array<{ id: number; name: string }> } }).auth.teams ?? [];
const userHasMultipleTeams = authTeams.length > 1;
const singleTeam = authTeams.length === 1 ? authTeams[0] : null;

const props = defineProps<{
    data?: ClosingFormData,
    validate: Validation<ValidationArgs<unknown>, ClosingFormData>,
    formData: UseAPIFormReturn<ClosingFormData>,
    disabled?: boolean,
}>();

const emit = defineEmits<{
    (e: 'insuredChange', payload: { is_bank: boolean | null }): void
    (e: 'insuranceTypeChange', payload: InsuranceType | null): void
}>();

const { validate, formData, data } = props;

const insurance_types_all = ref<InsuranceType[]>([]);
const insurance_types = ref<{ data: { [key: string]: InsuranceType[] }, loading: boolean }>({ data: {}, loading: false, });
const account_executives = ref<{ data: AccounExecutive[], loading: boolean }>({ data: [], loading: false, });
const insureds = ref<{ data: Insured[], loading: boolean }>({ data: [], loading: false });
const statuses = ref({ data: [{ value: '0', label: 'New' }, { value: '1', label: 'Renew' }, { value: '5', label: 'History' }, { value: '6', label: 'Cancel' }, { value: '7', label: 'Overcharge' }], loading: false, });
const source_of_businesses = ref<{ data: { value: string; label: string }[]; loading: boolean }>({ data: [], loading: false });
const partners = ref({ data: [], loading: false });
const storeys = ref<{ data: { value: string; label: string }[]; loading: boolean }>({ data: [], loading: false });

const selectedInsuranceType = computed(() => {
    if (!formData.insurance_type_code) return null;
    return insurance_types_all.value.find(x => String(x.code) === String(formData.insurance_type_code)) ?? null;
});

const showMopNumber = computed(() => {
    return selectedInsuranceType.value?.risk_category?.code?.toLowerCase() === 'mc';
});

// Policy autocomplete + modal state
const policy_modal_open = ref(false);
const policy_creating = ref(false);

interface PolicyEntry {
    policy_number: string;
    sequence: number;
    certificate_number: string;
    file_url: string;
    file?: File | null;
    uuid?: string
    id?: number;
}

const policy_entries = ref<PolicyEntry[]>([]);
const policy_autocomplete_refs = ref<InstanceType<typeof AutoCompleteInput>[]>([]);
const editing_policy_index = ref<number | null>(null);
const new_policy = reactive({
    policy_number: '',
    certificate_number: '',
    endorsement_number: '',
    note: '',
    date_sent: '',
    date_received: '',
    file: null as File | null,
});

onMounted(async () => {
    if (authTeams.length === 1) {
        formData.team = authTeams[0]?.name;
        formData.team_id = authTeams[0]?.id;
    }

    account_executives.value.data = await helper.api_get<AccounExecutive>({ url: route('master.accountexecutives.index'), params: { type: 'collection' } });
    const ins_type_data = await helper.api_get<InsuranceType>({ params: { order_by: 'riskCategory.code', type: 'collection', relations: ['riskCategory'].join() }, url: route('master.insurancetypes.index') });
    insurance_types_all.value = ins_type_data;

    const ins_type_options: { [key: string]: InsuranceType[] } = {};
    for (const option of ins_type_data) {
        const risk_category_name = option?.risk_category?.code.toUpperCase() + ' - ' + option?.risk_category?.name;
        const array_groups = ins_type_options[risk_category_name] || [];
        array_groups.push(option);
        ins_type_options[risk_category_name] = array_groups;
    }

    insurance_types.value.data = ins_type_options;

    insureds.value.data = await helper.api_get<Insured>({ url: route('master.insureds.index'), params: { type: 'collection' } });

    const source_of_business_data = await helper.api_get<{ value: string; label: string }>({
        url: constantApi.index('source-of-business'),
    });
    source_of_businesses.value.data = source_of_business_data;

    const storey_data = await helper.api_get<{ value: string; label: string }>({
        url: constantApi.index('storey'),
    });
    storeys.value.data = storey_data;

    // Only emit insuredChange on create (new) mode
    // On edit mode, use existing backend values - don't auto-fill
    const isEditMode = !!(props.data as any)?.closing_number;
    if (!isEditMode && formData.insured_code) {
        const selected = insureds.value.data.find(x => String(x.code) === formData.insured_code);
        if (selected) {
            emit('insuredChange', {
                is_bank: selected.is_bank ?? null,
                banker_clause_code: selected.banker_clause_code ?? null,
                banker_clause_name: selected.banker_clause_name ?? null,
                bank_name: selected.bank_name ?? null,
            });
        }
    }

    if (props.data?.policies && props.data.policies.length > 0) {
        policy_entries.value = props.data.policies
            .sort((a, b) => (a.sequence ?? 0) - (b.sequence ?? 0))
            .map((p, idx) => ({
                ...p,
                id: p.id,
                uuid: p.uuid,
                policy_number: p.policy_number ?? '',
                sequence: p.sequence ?? idx + 1,
                certificate_number: p.certificate_number ?? '',
                file_url: p.file_url ?? '',
                file: null,
            }));
        formData.policy_numbers = policy_entries.value.map(p => p.policy_number).join(',');
    } else if (props.data?.policy_numbers) {
        const parts = String(props.data.policy_numbers).split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
        policy_entries.value = parts.map((pn, idx) => ({
            policy_number: pn,
            sequence: idx + 1,
            certificate_number: '',
            file_url: '',
            file: null,
        }));
    }

    if (policy_entries.value.length > 0) {
        await nextTick();
        policy_entries.value.forEach((entry, idx) => {
            policy_autocomplete_refs.value[idx]?.setQuery(entry.policy_number);
        });
    }
});

const calculate_period_diff = () => {
    if (props.formData.period_from && props.formData.period_to) {
        const from = dayjs(props.formData.period_from);
        const to = dayjs(props.formData.period_to);
        return Math.abs(from.diff(to, 'day'))
    }

    return ''
}

const periode = ref(calculate_period_diff());

watch(() => props.formData.period_from, (period_from) => {
    if (props.formData.period_to) {
        const from = dayjs(period_from);
        const to = dayjs(props.formData.period_to);
        periode.value = Math.abs(from.diff(to, 'day'))
    }
});

watch(() => props.formData.period_to, (period_to) => {
    if (props.formData.period_from) {
        const from = dayjs(props.formData.period_from);
        const to = dayjs(period_to);
        periode.value = Math.abs(from.diff(to, 'day'))
    }
});

watch(() => props.formData.insurance_type_code, (code) => {
    const selected = insurance_types_all.value.find(x => String(x.code) === code) ?? null;
    if (selected && ['FR15', 'FR25', 'FR07', 'FR16', 'FR17', 'FR23'].includes(selected.code || '')) {

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Models\Transaction;

use App\Traits\HasBaseOwner;
use App\Traits\HasBaseTable;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;
use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;
use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;

class Policy extends Model
{
    use HasBaseOwner, HasBaseTable, HasFactory, LogsActivity;

    protected $fillable = [
        'closing_id',
        'closing_number',
        'insured_id',
        'insured_code',
        'insured_name',
        'policy_number',
        'date_received',
        'account_executive_id',
        'account_executive_code',
        'account_executive_name',
        'insurance_type_id',
        'insurance_type_code',
        'insurance_type_name',
        'note',
        'date_sent',
        'date_received_client',
        'endorsement_number',
        'endorsement_id',
        'certificate_number',
        'sequence',
        'file_url',
        'created_by',
        'updated_by',
        'deleted_by',
        'created_at',
        'updated_at',
        'deleted_at',
    ];

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults();
    }

    public function closing(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Closing::class, 'closing_id');
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Web\Transaction;

use App\DTOs\Requests\CreateClosingDto;
use App\DTOs\Requests\CreateClosingInsurerDto;
use App\DTOs\Requests\CreateClosingSubbrokerageDto;
use App\DTOs\Resources\SubbrokerageDto;
use App\Enums\ClosingFilePurposeEnum;
use App\Http\Repositories\DncnRepository;
use App\Http\Repositories\UploadRepository;
use App\Http\Requests\Api\Transaction\ApiClosingRequest;
use App\Http\Resources\Api\Transaction\ClosingResource;
use App\Models\File;
use App\Models\Master\AccountExecutive;
use App\Models\Master\Currency;
use App\Models\Master\InsuranceType;
use App\Models\Master\Insured;
use App\Models\Master\Insurer;
use App\Models\Master\Subbrokerage;
use App\Models\Master\Team;
use App\Models\Master\User;
use App\Models\Transaction\Closing;
use App\Models\Transaction\ClosingInsurer;
use App\Models\Transaction\ClosingSubbrokerage;
use App\Models\Transaction\Policy;
use App\Services\BaseCrud\BaseWebCrud;
use Carbon\Carbon;
use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class ClosingController extends BaseWebCrud
{
    public string $model = Closing::class;

    public string $viewPath = 'Transaction/Closing';

    public string $viewEdit = '/Create';

    public string $resource = ClosingResource::class;

    public string $storeValidator = ApiClosingRequest::class;

    public string $updateValidator = ApiClosingRequest::class;

    public string $modelKey = 'uuid';

    public bool $use_redirect = false;

    public bool $with_resource = true;

    public string $defaultOrder = 'id';

    public string $defaultSort = 'desc';

    /** @var array<string> */
    public array $searchAble = ['closing_number'];

    public function __construct(protected UploadRepository $upload_repository) {}

    public function __prepareDataUpdate(array $data): array
    {
        return $this->__prepareDataStore($data);
    }

    public function __prepareDataStore(array $data): array
    {
        $ins_type = InsuranceType::where('code', $data['insurance_type_code'])->first();
        $acc_ex = AccountExecutive::where('code', $data['account_executive_code'])->first();
        $data['closing_number'] = ($data['closing_number'] ?? null) ? $data['closing_number'] : Closing::generateClosingNumber($acc_ex->code, mb_strtoupper((string) $ins_type->code));
        $data['user_id'] = Auth::id();
        $data['is_eq'] = filter_var(($data['is_eq'] ?? null), FILTER_VALIDATE_BOOL);
        $data['expert_email'] = 'aditya.budi@premiro.com';
        $data['user_email'] = Auth::user()->email;
        $data['user_id'] = Auth::id();
        $expert_user = User::where('email', 'aditya.budi@premiro.com')->first();
        if ($expert_user) {
            $data['expert_id'] = $expert_user->id;
            $data['expert_name'] = $expert_user->name;
        }
        if ($data['insurance_type_code']) {
            $instype = InsuranceType::where('code', $data['insurance_type_code'])->first();
            $data['insurance_type_id'] = $instype->id;
            $data['insurance_type_code'] = $instype->code;
            $data['insurance_type_name'] = $instype->name;
            $data['group_closing'] = $instype->group_closing;
        }

        if ($data['account_executive_code']) {
            $data['account_executive_id'] = $acc_ex->id;
            $data['account_executive_code'] = $acc_ex->code;
            $data['account_executive_name'] = $acc_ex->name;
        }

        if ($data['currency_code']) {
            $data['currency_id'] = Currency::where('code', $data['currency_code'])->first()?->id;
        }

        if ($data['insured_code']) {
            $ins = Insured::where('code', $data['insured_code'])->first();
            $data['insured_id'] = $ins?->id;
            $data['insured_code'] = $ins?->code;
            $data['insured_name'] = $ins?->name;
        }

        if (! empty($data['team'])) {
            $team = Team::where('name', $data['team'])->first();
            $data['team_id'] = $team?->id;
        }

        return CreateClosingDto::from(array_filter($data, fn ($v): bool => $v !== null))
            ->prepareDataStore(unset_array: ['subbrokerages', 'policy_number', 'certificate_number', 'insurers', 'closing_files', 'closing_e_collections', 'create_closing_dncn_detail', 'create_closing_insurer_detail', 'create_closing_subbrokerage_detail', 'policy_numbers_array', 'policies'])
            ->toArray();
    }

    public function __beforeQueryShow(): void
    {
        $this->modelKey = 'id';
    }

    public function __afterStore(): void
    {
        $this->afterStore();
    }

    public function __afterUpdate(): void
    {
        $this->afterStore(true);
    }

    public function __beforeEdit(): void
    {
        $this->relationShow = ['insurers', 'updater', 'subbrokerages', 'closingFiles', 'closingECollections', 'policies'];
    }

    public function approve(string $closing): \Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse
    {
        return $this->DBSafe(function () use ($closing) {

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\DTOs\Requests;

use App\CastAndTransformers\YmdDateCastAndTransformer;
use App\Contracts\DataPreparableInterface;
use App\Traits\HasDtoPrepareTrait;
use Carbon\CarbonImmutable;
use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
use Spatie\LaravelData\Attributes\WithCast;
use Spatie\LaravelData\Data;

class CreateClosingDto extends Data implements DataPreparableInterface
{
    use HasDtoPrepareTrait;

    public function __construct(
        public ?string $insurance_proposal,
        public ?string $cover_note,
        public ?string $closing_number,
        public ?string $source_of_business,
        public ?string $partner,

        #[WithCast(YmdDateCastAndTransformer::class)]
        public ?CarbonImmutable $transaction_date,

        #[WithCast(YmdDateCastAndTransformer::class)]
        public ?CarbonImmutable $policy_date,

        #[WithCast(YmdDateCastAndTransformer::class)]
        public ?CarbonImmutable $period_from,

        #[WithCast(YmdDateCastAndTransformer::class)]
        public ?CarbonImmutable $period_to,

        public ?int $insured_id,
        public string $insured_code,
        public ?string $insured_name,
        public ?int $user_id,
        public ?string $user_email,
        public ?int $account_executive_id,
        public string $account_executive_code,
        public ?string $account_executive_name,
        public ?int $status,
        public ?int $insurance_type_id,
        public string $insurance_type_code,
        public ?string $insurance_type_name,
        public ?string $group_closing,

        #[WithCast(YmdDateCastAndTransformer::class)]
        public ?CarbonImmutable $last_update,

        public ?int $currency_id,
        public string $currency_code,
        public float $sum_insured,
        public ?float $premium_percentage,
        public float $premium_amount,
        public ?float $discount_percentage,
        public ?float $discount_amount,
        public ?float $brokerage_percentage,
        public ?float $brokerage_amount,
        public ?float $policy_cost,
        public ?float $stamp_duty,
        public ?float $other_cost,
        public ?float $exchange_rate,
        public ?int $installment,
        public ?int $credit_term,

        #[WithCast(YmdDateCastAndTransformer::class)]
        public ?CarbonImmutable $due_date,

        public ?string $last_dncn,
        public ?string $last_closing,
        public ?string $remark,
        public ?string $qq_name,
        public ?string $qq_address,
        public ?bool $is_mop,
        public ?string $mop_number,
        public ?string $policy_numbers,
        public ?string $last_policy_number,
        public ?string $new_closing_number,
        public ?string $dncn_number,
        public ?bool $is_prorate,
        public ?bool $is_above_a_billion,

        #[WithCast(YmdDateCastAndTransformer::class)]
        public ?CarbonImmutable $instruction_date,

        public ?int $id_approval,
        public ?CarbonImmutable $approval_time,
        public ?bool $is_outstanding,

        #[WithCast(YmdDateCastAndTransformer::class)]
        public ?CarbonImmutable $client_instruction_date,

        public ?string $sub_class,
        public ?string $transaction_type,
        public ?string $storey,
        public ?bool $is_eq,
        public ?string $eq_type,
        public ?string $bankers_clause,
        public ?bool $is_collateral,
        public ?string $collateral_refference,
        public ?string $spppb_number,
        public ?string $virtual_account_number,
        public ?string $debitur_name,
        public ?string $business_segment,
        public ?string $bank_rm_name,
        public ?string $payment_type,

        public array $insurers,
        public ?array $subbrokerages,
        public ?array $closing_files,
        public ?array $closing_e_collections,

        public ?bool $create_closing_dncn_detail,
        public ?bool $create_closing_insurer_detail,
        public ?bool $create_closing_subbrokerage_detail,
        public ?bool $is_bank,

        public ?string $bankers_clause_region,
        public ?string $bankers_clause_branch,
        public ?string $policy_number,
        public ?string $team,
        public ?int $team_id,
        public ?string $certificate_number,
        public ?string $expert_email,
        public ?int $expert_id,
        public ?string $expert_name,
    ) {
        $this->setDefaultValue();
    }

    public static function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'insured_code' => ['required', 'exists:insureds,code'],
            'account_executive_code' => ['required', 'exists:account_executives,code'],
            'insurance_type_code' => ['required', 'exists:insurance_types,code'],
            'currency_code' => ['required', 'exists:currencies,code'],
            'user_email' => ['required', 'exists:users,email'],

            'sum_insured' => ['required', 'gt:0'],
            'premium_amount' => ['required', 'lt:sum_insured'],
            'discount_amount' => ['nullable', 'lte:brokerage_amount'],
            'brokerage_amount' => ['nullable', 'lte:premium_amount'],

            'insurers' => ['required', 'array'],
            'insurers.*.insurer_code' => ['required', 'exists:insurers,code'],
            'insurers.*.name' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.due_date' => ['nullable', 'date:Y-m-d'],
            'insurers.*.share_gift' => ['required'],
            'insurers.*.policy_cost' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.stamp_duty' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.premium_amount' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.discount_percentage' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.discount_amount' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.brokerage_percentage' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.brokerage_amount' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.net_amount' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.is_vat' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.brokerage_ppn' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.brokerage_pph' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.approval' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.oc_percentage' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.oc_reset' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.oc_amount' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.ref_number' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.oc_ppn' => ['nullable'],
            'insurers.*.oc_pph' => ['nullable'],

            'subbrokerages' => ['array', 'nullable'],
            'subbrokerages.*.subbrokerage_code' => [
                function ($attr, $val, $fail): void {
                    $index = explode('.', $attr)[1];
                    $items = request()->input('subbrokerages', []);
                    $item = $items[$index] ?? [];
                    if (($item['amount'] > 0 || $item['brokerage_percentage'] <= 0 || $item['brokerage_percentage']) && empty($val)) {
                        $fail("The subbrokerages.$index.subbrokerage_code is required");
                    }
                },
                'exists:subbrokerages,code',
            ],
            'subbrokerages.*.amount' => [
                'nullable',
                'numeric',
                function ($attr, $val, $fail): void {
                    $index = explode('.', $attr)[1];
                    $items = request()->input('subbrokerages', []);
                    $item = $items[$index] ?? [];
                    if (! empty($item['subbrokerage_code']) && ($val === null || $val <= 0)) {
                        $fail('The amount must be greater than 0.');
                    }
                },
            ],
            'subbrokerages.*.is_vat' => ['nullable', 'boolean'],
            'subbrokerages.*.brokerage_percentage' => ['nullable', 'numeric'],
            'subbrokerages.*.premium_percentage' => ['nullable', 'numeric'],

    public static function generateClosingNumber(string $acc_ex_code, string $ins_type_code): string
    {

    }

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults();
    }

    public function insuranceType(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(InsuranceType::class, 'insurance_type_id');
    }

    public function accountExecutive(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(AccountExecutive::class, 'account_executive_id');
    }

    public function insured(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Insured::class, 'insured_id');
    }

    public function currency(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Currency::class, 'currency_id');
    }

    public function dncns(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Dncn::class, 'closing_id');
    }

    public function insurers(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ClosingInsurer::class, 'closing_id')->orderBy('is_leader', 'desc');
    }

    public function subbrokerages(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ClosingSubbrokerage::class, 'closing_id');
    }

    public function closingFiles(): MorphMany
    {
        return $this->morphMany(File::class, 'fileable')->where('purpose', ClosingFilePurposeEnum::FILE_PURPOSE_ATTACHMENT_FILE);
    }

    public function endorsements(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Endorsement::class, 'closing_id');
    }

    public function policies(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Policy::class, 'closing_id')->orderBy('sequence');
    }

    public function closingECollections(): MorphMany
    {
        return $this->morphMany(File::class, 'fileable')->where('purpose', ClosingFilePurposeEnum::FILE_PURPOSE_E_COLLECTION_FILE);
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Models\Transaction;

use App\Enums\ClosingFilePurposeEnum;
use App\Enums\ClosingStatusEnum;
use App\Models\File;
use App\Models\Master\AccountExecutive;
use App\Models\Master\Currency;
use App\Models\Master\InsuranceType;
use App\Models\Master\Insured;
use App\Services\SequenceNumberGenerator;
use App\Traits\HasBaseOwner;
use App\Traits\HasBaseTable;
use Carbon\Carbon;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\HasMany;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\MorphMany;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;
use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;

class Closing extends Model
{
    use HasBaseOwner;
    use HasBaseTable;
    use HasFactory;
    use LogsActivity;
    use SoftDeletes;

    protected $fillable = [
        'closing_number',
        'transaction_date',
        'policy_date',
        'period_from',
        'period_to',
        'insured_id',
        'insured_code',
        'insured_name',
        'user_id',
        'user_email',
        'account_executive_id',
        'account_executive_code',
        'account_executive_name',
        'status',
        'insurance_type_id',
        'insurance_type_code',
        'insurance_type_name',
        'insurance_proposal',
        'cover_note',
        'par',
        'last_update',
        'currency_code',
        'currency_id',
        'sum_insured',
        'premium_percentage',
        'premium_amount',
        'discount_percentage',
        'discount_amount',
        'additional_discount_percentage',
        'additional_discount_amount',
        'brokerage_percentage',
        'brokerage_amount',
        'policy_cost',
        'stamp_duty',
        'other_cost',
        'exchange_rate',
        'installment_id',
        'installment',
        'installment_number',
        'credit_term',
        'due_date',
        'last_dncn',
        'last_closing',
        'source_of_business',
        'partner',
        'remark',
        'qq_name',
        'qq_address',
        'is_mop',
        'is_bank',
        'mop_number',
        'policy_numbers',
        'last_policy_number',
        'new_closing_number',
        'dncn_number',
        'is_prorate',
        'instruction_date',
        'id_approval',
        'approval_time',
        'is_outstanding',
        'client_instruction_date',
        'sub_class',
        'transaction_type',
        'storey',
        'is_eq',
        'eq_type',
        'bankers_clause',
        'is_collateral',
        'collateral_refference',
        'number_of_storey',
        'group_closing',
        'spppb_number',
        'virtual_account_number',
        'debitur_name',
        'business_segment',
        'bank_rm_name',
        'payment_type',
        'bankers_clause_region',
        'bankers_clause_branch',
        'is_above_a_billion',
        'team',
        'team_id',
        'insurance_broker_expert',
        'expert_email',
        'expert_id',
        'expert_name',

        'created_by',
        'updated_by',
        'deleted_by',
        'created_at',
        'updated_at',
        'deleted_at',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'status' => ClosingStatusEnum::class,
        'transaction_date' => 'date:Y-m-d',
        'policy_date' => 'date:Y-m-d',
        'period_from' => 'date:Y-m-d',
        'period_to' => 'date:Y-m-d',
        'due_date' => 'date:Y-m-d',
        'instruction_date' => 'date:Y-m-d',
        'client_instruction_date' => 'date:Y-m-d',
        // add all date fields that exist in your table
        'created_at' => 'datetime',
        'updated_at' => 'datetime',
        'team_id' => 'integer',
    ];

    public static function generateClosingNumber(string $acc_ex_code, string $ins_type_code): string
    {
        return (new SequenceNumberGenerator)->generate(class: self::class, code: 'closing_number', suffix: '/'.$acc_ex_code.'/'.$ins_type_code.'/'.Carbon::now()->format('m/Y'));
    }

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults();
    }

    public function insuranceType(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(InsuranceType::class, 'insurance_type_id');
    }

    public function accountExecutive(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(AccountExecutive::class, 'account_executive_id');
    }

    public function insured(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Insured::class, 'insured_id');
    }

    public function currency(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Currency::class, 'currency_id');
    }

    public function dncns(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Dncn::class, 'closing_id');
    }

    public function insurers(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ClosingInsurer::class, 'closing_id')->orderBy('is_leader', 'desc');
    }

    public function subbrokerages(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ClosingSubbrokerage::class, 'closing_id');
    }

    public function closingFiles(): MorphMany
    {
        return $this->morphMany(File::class, 'fileable')->where('purpose', ClosingFilePurposeEnum::FILE_PURPOSE_ATTACHMENT_FILE);
    }

    public function endorsements(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Endorsement::class, 'closing_id');
    }

    public function policies(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Policy::class, 'closing_id')->orderBy('sequence');
    }

    public function closingECollections(): MorphMany
    {
        return $this->morphMany(File::class, 'fileable')->where('purpose', ClosingFilePurposeEnum::FILE_PURPOSE_E_COLLECTION_FILE);
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Models\Transaction;

use App\Traits\HasBaseOwner;
use App\Traits\HasBaseTable;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;
use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;
use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;

class Certificate extends Model
{
    use HasBaseOwner, HasBaseTable, HasFactory, LogsActivity;

    protected $fillable = [
        'policy_number',
        'certificate_number',
        'period_from',
        'period_to',
        'insurance_type_id',
        'insurance_type_code',
        'insurance_type_name',
        'closing_id',
    ];

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults();
    }

    public function closing(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Closing::class, 'closing_id');
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources\Api\Transaction;

use App\Http\Resources\Api\Master\AccountExecutiveResource;
use App\Http\Resources\Api\Master\CurrencyResource;
use App\Http\Resources\Api\Master\FileResource;
use App\Http\Resources\Api\Master\InsuranceTypeResource;
use App\Http\Resources\Api\Master\InsuredResource;
use App\Http\Resources\Api\Master\UserResource;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class ClosingResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'uuid' => $this->uuid,

            'cover_note' => $this->cover_note,
            'source_of_business' => $this->source_of_business,
            'partner' => $this->partner,
            'insurance_proposal' => $this->insurance_proposal,
            'closing_number' => $this->closing_number,
            'transaction_date' => $this->transaction_date?->toDateString(),
            'policy_date' => $this->policy_date?->toDateString(),
            'period_from' => $this->period_from?->toDateString(),
            'period_to' => $this->period_to?->toDateString(),
            'insured_id' => $this->insured_id,
            'insured_code' => $this->insured_code,
            'insured_name' => $this->insured_name,
            'user_id' => $this->user_id,
            'user_email' => $this->user_email,
            'account_executive_id' => $this->account_executive_id,
            'account_executive_code' => $this->account_executive_code,
            'account_executive_name' => $this->account_executive_name,
            'status' => $this->status,
            'status_label' => $this->status->label() ?? null,
            'insurance_type_id' => $this->insurance_type_id,
            'insurance_type_code' => $this->insurance_type_code,
            'insurance_type_name' => $this->insurance_type_code,
            'group_closing' => $this->group_closing,
            'last_update' => $this->last_update,
            'currency_code' => $this->currency_code,
            'currency_id' => $this->currency_id,
            'sum_insured' => $this->sum_insured,
            'premium_percentage' => $this->premium_percentage,
            'premium_amount' => $this->premium_amount,
            'discount_percentage' => $this->discount_percentage,
            'discount_amount' => $this->discount_amount,
            'additional_discount_percentage' => $this->additional_discount_percentage,
            'additional_discount_amount' => $this->additional_discount_amount,
            'brokerage_percentage' => $this->brokerage_percentage,
            'brokerage_amount' => $this->brokerage_amount,
            'policy_cost' => $this->policy_cost,
            'stamp_duty' => $this->stamp_duty,
            'other_cost' => $this->other_cost,
            'exchange_rate' => $this->exchange_rate,
            'installment' => $this->installment,
            'credit_term' => $this->credit_term,
            'due_date' => $this->due_date?->toDateString(),
            'last_dncn' => $this->last_dncn,
            'last_closing' => $this->last_closing,
            'remark' => $this->remark,
            'qq_name' => $this->qq_name,
            'qq_address' => $this->qq_address,
            'mop_number' => $this->mop_number,
            'policy_numbers' => $this->policy_numbers,
            'last_policy_number' => $this->last_policy_number,
            'dncn_number' => $this->dncn_number,
            'is_prorate' => $this->is_prorate,
            'instruction_date' => $this->instruction_date?->toDateString(),
            'id_approval' => $this->id_approval,
            'approval_time' => $this->approval_time,
            'is_outstanding' => $this->is_outstanding,
            'client_instruction_date' => $this->client_instruction_date?->toDateString(),
            'sub_class' => $this->sub_class,
            'transaction_type' => $this->transaction_type,
            'storey' => $this->storey,
            'is_eq' => $this->is_eq ? 'true' : 'false',
            'eq_type' => $this->eq_type,
            'bankers_clause' => $this->bankers_clause,
            'is_collateral' => $this->is_collateral,
            'collateral_refference' => $this->collateral_refference,
            'spppb_number' => $this->spppb_number,
            'virtual_account_number' => $this->virtual_account_number,
            'debitur_name' => $this->debitur_name,
            'business_segment' => $this->business_segment,
            'bank_rm_name' => $this->bank_rm_name,
            'payment_type' => $this->payment_type,
            'bankers_clause_region' => $this->bankers_clause_region,
            'bankers_clause_branch' => $this->bankers_clause_branch,
            'is_above_a_billion' => $this->is_above_a_billion,
            'team' => $this->team,
            'team_id' => $this->team_id,
            'expert_email' => $this->expert_email,
            'expert_id' => $this->expert_id,
            'expert_name' => $this->expert_name,

            'currency' => new CurrencyResource($this->whenLoaded('currency')),
            'account_executive' => new AccountExecutiveResource($this->whenLoaded('accountExecutive')),
            'insurance_type' => new InsuranceTypeResource($this->whenLoaded('insuranceType')),
            'insured' => new InsuredResource($this->whenLoaded('insured')),
            'insurers' => ClosingInsurerResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('insurers')),
            'subbrokerages' => ClosingSubbrokerageResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('subbrokerages')),
            'closing_files' => FileResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('closingFiles')),
            'closing_e_collections' => FileResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('closingECollections')),
            'endorsements' => EndorsementResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('endorsements')),
            'policies' => PolicyResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('policies')),
            'dncns' => DncnResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('dncns')),

            'creator' => new UserResource($this->whenLoaded('creator')),
            'updater' => new UserResource($this->whenLoaded('updater')),
            'destroyer' => new UserResource($this->whenLoaded('destroyer')),

            'created_at' => $this->created_at,
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at,
        ];
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\DTOs\Requests;

use App\CastAndTransformers\YmdDateCastAndTransformer;
use App\Contracts\DataPreparableInterface;
use App\Traits\HasDtoPrepareTrait;
use Carbon\CarbonImmutable;
use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
use Spatie\LaravelData\Attributes\WithCast;
use Spatie\LaravelData\Data;

class CreateClosingDto extends Data implements DataPreparableInterface
{
    use HasDtoPrepareTrait;

    public function __construct(
        public ?string $insurance_proposal,
        public ?string $cover_note,
        public ?string $closing_number,
        public ?string $source_of_business,
        public ?string $partner,

        #[WithCast(YmdDateCastAndTransformer::class)]
        public ?CarbonImmutable $transaction_date,

        #[WithCast(YmdDateCastAndTransformer::class)]
        public ?CarbonImmutable $policy_date,

        #[WithCast(YmdDateCastAndTransformer::class)]
        public ?CarbonImmutable $period_from,

        #[WithCast(YmdDateCastAndTransformer::class)]
        public ?CarbonImmutable $period_to,

        public ?int $insured_id,
        public string $insured_code,
        public ?string $insured_name,
        public ?int $user_id,

            'insurers.*.oc_pph' => ['nullable'],

            'subbrokerages' => ['array', 'nullable'],
            'subbrokerages.*.subbrokerage_code' => [
                function ($attr, $val, $fail): void {
                    $index = explode('.', $attr)[1];
                    $items = request()->input('subbrokerages', []);
                    $item = $items[$index] ?? [];
                    if (($item['amount'] > 0 || $item['brokerage_percentage'] <= 0 || $item['brokerage_percentage']) && empty($val)) {
                        $fail("The subbrokerages.$index.subbrokerage_code is required");
                    }
                },
                'exists:subbrokerages,code',
            ],
            'subbrokerages.*.amount' => [
                'nullable',
                'numeric',
                function ($attr, $val, $fail): void {
                    $index = explode('.', $attr)[1];
                    $items = request()->input('subbrokerages', []);
                    $item = $items[$index] ?? [];
                    if (! empty($item['subbrokerage_code']) && ($val === null || $val <= 0)) {
                        $fail('The amount must be greater than 0.');
                    }
                },
            ],
            'subbrokerages.*.is_vat' => ['nullable', 'boolean'],
            'subbrokerages.*.brokerage_percentage' => ['nullable', 'numeric'],
            'subbrokerages.*.premium_percentage' => ['nullable', 'numeric'],

            'subbrokerages.*.is_local_co_broking' => ['nullable'],
            'subbrokerages.*.is_individu' => ['nullable'],
            'closing_files' => [
                'array',
                'nullable',
                function ($attr, $val, $fail): void {
                    $items = request()->input('closing_files', []);
                    $hasFile = false;
                    foreach ($items as $item) {
                        if (! empty($item['file']) || ! empty($item['id'])) {
                            $hasFile = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    if (! $hasFile) {
                        $fail('At least one closing file is required');
                    }
                },
            ],
            'closing_files.*.id' => ['nullable', 'exists:files,id'],
            'closing_files.*.file' => [
                function ($attr, $val, $fail): void {
                    $index = explode('.', $attr)[1];
                    $items = request()->input('closing_files', []);
                    $item = $items[$index] ?? [];
                    if ($val === null && (! empty($item['remark']) || ! empty($item['endorsement']))) {
                        $fail("The closing_files.$index.file field is required");
                    } elseif ((! empty($val) || ! empty($item['remark']) || ! empty($item['endorsement'])) && ! ($val instanceof UploadedFile)) {
                        $fail("The closing_files.$index.file field must be a file");
                    }
                },
                'max:50140',
            ],
            'closing_files.*.remark' => ['nullable'],
            'closing_files.*.endorsement' => ['nullable'],
            'closing_files' => [
                'array',
                'nullable',
                function ($attr, $val, $fail): void {
                    $items = request()->input('closing_files', []);
                    $hasFile = false;
                    foreach ($items as $item) {
                        if (! empty($item['file']) || ! empty($item['id'])) {
                            $hasFile = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    if (! $hasFile) {

            'closing_e_collections' => ['array', 'nullable'],
            'closing_e_collections.*.id' => ['nullable', 'exists:files,id'],

                    $items = request()->input('closing_e_collections', []);
                    $item = $items[$index];
                    if ($val === null && (! empty($item['remark']))) {

                    } elseif ((! empty($val) || ! empty($item['remark'])) && ! ($val instanceof UploadedFile)) {

                    }

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Web\Transaction;

use App\DTOs\Requests\CreateClosingDto;
use App\DTOs\Requests\CreateClosingInsurerDto;
use App\DTOs\Requests\CreateClosingSubbrokerageDto;
use App\DTOs\Resources\SubbrokerageDto;
use App\Enums\ClosingFilePurposeEnum;
use App\Http\Repositories\DncnRepository;
use App\Http\Repositories\UploadRepository;
use App\Http\Requests\Api\Transaction\ApiClosingRequest;
use App\Http\Resources\Api\Transaction\ClosingResource;
use App\Models\File;
use App\Models\Master\AccountExecutive;
use App\Models\Master\Currency;
use App\Models\Master\InsuranceType;
use App\Models\Master\Insured;
use App\Models\Master\Insurer;
use App\Models\Master\Subbrokerage;
use App\Models\Master\Team;
use App\Models\Master\User;
use App\Models\Transaction\Closing;
use App\Models\Transaction\ClosingInsurer;
use App\Models\Transaction\ClosingSubbrokerage;
use App\Models\Transaction\Policy;
use App\Models\Transaction\Certificate;
use App\Services\BaseCrud\BaseWebCrud;
use Carbon\Carbon;
use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class ClosingController extends BaseWebCrud
{
    public string $model = Closing::class;

    public string $viewPath = 'Transaction/Closing';

    public string $viewEdit = '/Create';

    public string $resource = ClosingResource::class;

    public string $storeValidator = ApiClosingRequest::class;

    public string $updateValidator = ApiClosingRequest::class;

    public string $modelKey = 'uuid';

    public bool $use_redirect = false;

    public bool $with_resource = true;

    public string $defaultOrder = 'id';

    public string $defaultSort = 'desc';

    /** @var array<string> */
    public array $searchAble = ['closing_number'];

    public function __construct(protected UploadRepository $upload_repository) {}

    public function __prepareDataUpdate(array $data): array
    {
        return $this->__prepareDataStore($data);
    }

    public function __prepareDataStore(array $data): array
    {
        $ins_type = InsuranceType::where('code', $data['insurance_type_code'])->first();
        $acc_ex = AccountExecutive::where('code', $data['account_executive_code'])->first();
        $data['closing_number'] = ($data['closing_number'] ?? null) ? $data['closing_number'] : Closing::generateClosingNumber($acc_ex->code, mb_strtoupper((string) $ins_type->code));
        $data['user_id'] = Auth::id();
        $data['is_eq'] = filter_var(($data['is_eq'] ?? null), FILTER_VALIDATE_BOOL);
        $data['expert_email'] = 'aditya.budi@premiro.com';
        $data['user_email'] = Auth::user()->email;
        $data['user_id'] = Auth::id();
        $expert_user = User::where('email', 'aditya.budi@premiro.com')->first();
        if ($expert_user) {
            $data['expert_id'] = $expert_user->id;
            $data['expert_name'] = $expert_user->name;
        }
        if ($data['insurance_type_code']) {
            $instype = InsuranceType::where('code', $data['insurance_type_code'])->first();
            $data['insurance_type_id'] = $instype->id;
            $data['insurance_type_code'] = $instype->code;
            $data['insurance_type_name'] = $instype->name;
            $data['group_closing'] = $instype->group_closing;
        }

        if ($data['account_executive_code']) {
            $data['account_executive_id'] = $acc_ex->id;
            $data['account_executive_code'] = $acc_ex->code;
            $data['account_executive_name'] = $acc_ex->name;
        }

        if ($data['currency_code']) {
            $data['currency_id'] = Currency::where('code', $data['currency_code'])->first()?->id;
        }

        if ($data['insured_code']) {
            $ins = Insured::where('code', $data['insured_code'])->first();
            $data['insured_id'] = $ins?->id;
            $data['insured_code'] = $ins?->code;
            $data['insured_name'] = $ins?->name;
        }

        if (! empty($data['team'])) {
            $team = Team::where('name', $data['team'])->first();
            $data['team_id'] = $team?->id;
        }

        return CreateClosingDto::from(array_filter($data, fn ($v): bool => $v !== null))
            ->prepareDataStore(unset_array: ['subbrokerages', 'policy_number', 'certificate_number', 'insurers', 'closing_files', 'closing_e_collections', 'create_closing_dncn_detail', 'create_closing_insurer_detail', 'create_closing_subbrokerage_detail', 'policy_numbers_array', 'policies'])
            ->toArray();
    }

    public function __beforeQueryShow(): void
    {
        $this->modelKey = 'id';
    }

    public function __afterStore(): void
    {
        $this->afterStore();
    }

    public function __afterUpdate(): void
    {
        $this->afterStore(true);
    }

    public function __beforeEdit(): void
    {
        $this->relationShow = ['insurers', 'updater', 'subbrokerages', 'closingFiles', 'closingECollections', 'policies'];
    }

    public function approve(string $closing): \Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse
    {
        return $this->DBSafe(function () use ($closing) {
            $closingModel = Closing::where('uuid', $closing)->firstOrFail();

            if ($closingModel->id_approval) {
                return response()->json(['message' => 'Closing already approved'], 422);
            }

            $closingModel->update([
                'id_approval' => Auth::id(),
                'approval_time' => Carbon::now(),
            ]);

            $this->row = $closingModel;
            $this->requestData = new \Illuminate\Http\Request($closingModel->toArray());

            $dncn_repository = new DncnRepository($closingModel, $this->requestData);
            $dncn_repository->createDncn(is_approved_by_manager: true);

            $closingModel->refresh();

            return response()->json([
                'data' => new ClosingResource($closingModel->load(['insurers', 'subbrokerages', 'closingFiles', 'closingECollections', 'dncns', 'currency', 'accountExecutive', 'insuranceType', 'insured'])),
                'message' => 'Closing approved successfully',
            ]);
        });
    }

    private function afterStore(bool $is_update = false): void
    {
        if (! empty($this->requestData->closing_files)) {
            $closing_file_ids = collect($this->requestData->closing_files)->pluck('id')->filter()->toArray();

            $closing_files = $this->row->closingFiles()->whereNotIn('id', $closing_file_ids)->get();

            foreach ($closing_files as $closing_file) {
                if ($closing_file['path']) {
                    $this->upload_repository->delete($closing_file['path']);
                }

                $closing_file->delete();
            }

            foreach ($this->requestData->closing_files as $file) {
                if (! empty($file['id'] ?? null)) {
                    $closing_file = File::find($file['id']);
                    if (! empty($file['file']) && $file['file'] instanceof UploadedFile && $closing_file['path']) {
                        $this->upload_repository->delete($closing_file['path']);
                    }

                    $closing_file->remark = $file['remark'];
                } else {
                    $closing_file = File::create([
                        'fileable_type' => $this->model,
                        'fileable_id' => $this->row->id,
                        'remark' => $file['remark'] ?? '',
                        'purpose' => ClosingFilePurposeEnum::FILE_PURPOSE_ATTACHMENT_FILE,
                    ]);
                }

                if (! empty($file['file']) && $file['file'] instanceof UploadedFile) {
                    $upload = $this->upload_repository->upload(
                        $file['file'],
                        'closing/'.mb_strtoupper($this->row->insuranceType->riskCategory->code ?? 'none').'/'.Carbon::now()->format('Y/m'),
                        str_replace('/', '_', $this->row->closing_number)."_$closing_file->id",
                    );

                    $closing_file->title = $upload['name'];
                    $closing_file->path = $upload['path'];
                    $closing_file->ext = $upload['ext'];
                    $closing_file->url = $upload['url'];
                }

                $closing_file->save();
            }
        }

        if (! empty($this->requestData->closing_e_collections)) {
            $closing_e_collection_ids = collect($this->requestData->closing_e_collections)->pluck('id')->filter()->toArray();

            $closing_e_collections = $this->row->closingECollections()->whereNotIn('id', $closing_e_collection_ids)->get();

            foreach ($closing_e_collections as $closing_e_collection) {
                if ($closing_e_collection['path']) {
                    $this->upload_repository->delete($closing_e_collection['path']);
                }

                $closing_e_collection->delete();
            }

            foreach ($this->requestData->closing_e_collections as $file) {
                if (! empty($file['id'] ?? null)) {
                    $closing_e_collection = File::find($file['id']);
                    if (! empty($file['file']) && $file['file'] instanceof UploadedFile && $closing_e_collection['path']) {
                        $this->upload_repository->delete($closing_e_collection['path']);
                    }

                    $closing_e_collection->remark = $file['remark'];
                } else {
                    $closing_e_collection = File::create([
                        'fileable_type' => $this->model,
                        'fileable_id' => $this->row->id,
                        'remark' => $file['remark'] ?? '',
                        'purpose' => ClosingFilePurposeEnum::FILE_PURPOSE_E_COLLECTION_FILE,
                    ]);
                }

                if (! empty($file['file']) && $file['file'] instanceof UploadedFile) {
                    $upload = $this->upload_repository->upload(
                        $file['file'],
                        'closing/'.mb_strtoupper($this->row->insuranceType->riskCategory->code ?? 'none').'/'.Carbon::now()->format('Y/m'),
                        str_replace('/', '_', $this->row->closing_number)."_$closing_e_collection->id",
                    );

                    $closing_e_collection->title = $upload['name'];
                    $closing_e_collection->path = $upload['path'];
                    $closing_e_collection->ext = $upload['ext'];
                    $closing_e_collection->url = $upload['url'];
                }

                $closing_e_collection->save();
            }
        }

        $insurers = $this->requestData['insurers'] ?? [];
        $existingInsurerIds = collect($insurers)->pluck('id')->filter()->toArray();
        $this->row->insurers()->whereNotIn('id', $existingInsurerIds)->delete();

        foreach ($insurers as $insurer) {
            $insurerData = $insurer;
            $insurerData['closing_id'] = $this->row->id;
            $insurerData['closing_number'] = $this->row->closing_number;
            $insurerData['user_id'] = $this->row->user_id;
            $insurerModel = Insurer::where('code', $insurerData['insurer_code'])->first();
            $insurerData['insurer_id'] = $insurerModel->id;
            $insurerData['insurer_name'] = $insurerModel->name;
            $insurerData['is_leader'] = filter_var($insurer['is_leader'] ?? false, FILTER_VALIDATE_BOOLEAN);

            $dto = CreateClosingInsurerDto::from(array_filter($insurerData, fn ($ins): bool => $ins !== null));

            if (! empty($insurer['id'])) {
                $closingInsurer = ClosingInsurer::find($insurer['id']);
                if ($closingInsurer) {
                    $closingInsurer->update($dto->toArray());
                }
            } else {
                ClosingInsurer::create($dto->toArray());
            }
        }

        $leader = ClosingInsurer::where('closing_number', $this->row->closing_number)->where('is_leader', true)->first();
        if (! $leader) {
            $leader = ClosingInsurer::where('closing_number', $this->row->closing_number)->orderBy('share_gift', 'desc')->first();
            $leader->is_leader = true;
            $leader->save();
        }

        $subbrokerages = $this->requestData['subbrokerages'] ?? [];
        $existingSubbrokerageIds = collect($subbrokerages)->pluck('id')->filter()->toArray();
        $this->row->subbrokerages()->whereNotIn('id', $existingSubbrokerageIds)->delete();

        foreach ($subbrokerages as $subbrokerage) {
            $subbrokerageData = $subbrokerage;
            $subbrokerageData['closing_id'] = $this->row->id;
            $sb = SubbrokerageDto::from(Subbrokerage::where('code', $subbrokerageData['subbrokerage_code'])->first());
            $subbrokerageData['subbrokerage_id'] = $sb->id;
            $subbrokerageData['subbrokerage_code'] = $sb->code;
            $subbrokerageData['subbrokerage_name'] = $sb->name;
            $subbrokerageData['closing_number'] = $this->row->closing_number;

            $dto = CreateClosingSubbrokerageDto::from($subbrokerageData);

            if (! empty($subbrokerage['id'])) {
                $closingSubbrokerage = ClosingSubbrokerage::find($subbrokerage['id']);
                if ($closingSubbrokerage) {
                    $closingSubbrokerage->update($dto->toArray());
                }
            } else {
                ClosingSubbrokerage::create($dto->toArray());
            }
        }

        $this->syncPolicies();
    }

    private function syncPolicies(): void
    {
        $policyNumbersArray = $this->requestData->input('policy_numbers_array', []);
        $policyNumbers = [];
        $certificateNumbers = [];

        if (empty($policyNumbersArray) && ! empty($this->requestData->input('policy_numbers'))) {
            $parts = array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(',', $this->requestData->input('policy_numbers', ''))));
            $policyNumbersArray = array_map(fn ($pn, $seq) => ['policy_number' => $pn, 'sequence' => $seq], $parts, range(1, count($parts)));
        }

        foreach ($policyNumbersArray as $entry) {
            if (empty($entry['policy_number'])) {
                continue;
            }

            $policyNumbers[] = $entry['policy_number'];

            $existingPolicy = Policy::where('closing_id', $this->row->id)
                ->where('policy_number', $entry['policy_number'])
                ->first();

            // Determine certificate number – generate if not supplied
            $certNumber = $entry['certificate_number'] ?? null;
            if (! $certNumber) {
                // Use SequenceNumberGenerator with prefix = policy_number
                $certNumber = \App\Services\SequenceNumberGenerator::generate(
                    class: \App\Models\Transaction\Certificate::class,
                    code: $entry['policy_number'], // unique per policy
                    leading_zero: 5,
                    prefix: $entry['policy_number']
                );
            }
            $certificateNumbers[] = $certNumber;

            $policyData = [
                'note' => $existingPolicy['note'] ?? null,
                'date_sent' => $existingPolicy['date_sent'] ?? null,
                'date_received' => $existingPolicy['date_received'] ?? null,
                'file_url' => $entry['file_url'] ?? null,
                'policy_number' => $entry['policy_number'],
                'sequence' => $entry['sequence'] ?? 1,
                'certificate_number' => $certNumber,
                'closing_id' => $this->row->id,
                'closing_number' => $this->row->closing_number,
                'insured_id' => $this->row->insured_id,
                'insured_code' => $this->row->insured_code,
                'insured_name' => $this->row->insured_name,
                'account_executive_id' => $this->row->account_executive_id,
                'account_executive_code' => $this->row->account_executive_code,
                'account_executive_name' => $this->row->account_executive_name,
                'insurance_type_id' => $this->row->insurance_type_id,
                'insurance_type_code' => $this->row->insurance_type_code,
                'insurance_type_name' => $this->row->insurance_type_name,
            ];

            if ($existingPolicy) {
                $existingPolicy->update($policyData);
            } else {
                Policy::create($policyData);
            }

            // Upsert certificate record
            $certificate = \App\Models\Transaction\Certificate::firstOrNew([
                'policy_number' => $entry['policy_number'],
                'closing_id' => $this->row->id,
            ]);
            $certificate->certificate_number = $certNumber;
            $certificate->period_from = $this->row->period_from;
            $certificate->period_to = $this->row->period_to;
            $certificate->insurance_type_id = $this->row->insurance_type_id;
            $certificate->insurance_type_code = $this->row->insurance_type_code;
            $certificate->insurance_type_name = $this->row->insurance_type_name;
            $certificate->save();
        }

        $this->row->update([
            'policy_numbers' => implode(',', $policyNumbers),
            'certificate_numbers' => implode(',', $certificateNumbers),
        ]);

        Policy::where('closing_id', $this->row->id)
            ->whereNotIn('policy_number', $policyNumbers)
            ->delete();
    }
}

import type { AccounExecutive, Currency, File, InsuranceType, Insured } from "./master"
import type { Dncn } from "./dncn"
import { User } from "./user"

export type ClosingFormData = Partial<Closing>

export interface Closing {
    id: number
    uuid: string
    closing_number: string
    transaction_date: string
    account_executive_id?: string | number | null
    account_executive_code?: string | null
    insurance_type_id?: string | number | null
    insurance_type_code?: string | null
    insured_id?: string | number | null
    insured_code?: string | null
    level?: string | null
    path?: string | null
    status?: string | number | null
    status_label?: string | null
    policy_numbers?: string | null
    policy_date?: string | null
    cover_note?: string | null
    client_instruction_date?: string | null
    instruction_date?: string | null
    period_from?: string | null
    period_to?: string | null

### 2. Backend: Certificate API (Standalone)
**New endpoint**: `POST /certificates` (web + api)

**Logic in `CertificateController::store()`**:
```php
public function store(Request $request)
{
    $data = $request->validate([
        'policy_number' => ['required', 'exists:policies,policy_number'],
        'closing_id' => ['required', 'exists:closings,id'],
    ]);

    // Generate certificate_number using SequenceNumberGenerator
    $certNumber = SequenceNumberGenerator::generate(
        Certificate::class,
        $data['policy_number'], // code
        5, // leading_zero
        $data['policy_number'] // prefix
    );

    $certificate = Certificate::create([
        'policy_number' => $data['policy_number'],
        'certificate_number' => $certNumber,
        'closing_id' => $data['closing_id'],
        'period_from' => Closing::find($data['closing_id'])->period_from,
        'period_to' => Closing::find($data['closing_id'])->period_to,
        'insurance_type_id' => Closing::find($data['closing_id'])->insurance_type_id,
        'insurance_type_code' => Closing::find($data['closing_id'])->insurance_type_code,
        'insurance_type_name' => Closing::find($data['closing_id'])->insurance_type_name,
    ]);

    // Update closing.certificate_numbers
    $closing = Closing::find($data['closing_id']);
    $existing = $closing->certificate_numbers ? explode(',', $closing->certificate_numbers) : [];
    $existing[] = $certNumber;
    $closing->update(['certificate_numbers' => implode(',', $existing)]);

    return response()->json(['data' => $certificate]);
}
```

arguments.content:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api\Transaction;

use App\Http\Requests\Api\Transaction\ApiCertificateRequest;
use App\Models\Transaction\Certificate;
use App\Models\Transaction\Closing;
use App\Services\SequenceNumberGenerator;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class CertificateController
{
    public function generate(): JsonResponse
    {
        $data = request()->validate([
            'policy_number' => ['required', 'string', 'exists:policies,policy_number'],
            'closing_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:closings,id'],
            'period_from' => ['nullable', 'date:Y-m-d'],
            'period_to' => ['nullable', 'date:Y-m-d'],
            'insurance_type_code' => ['nullable', 'string', 'exists:insurance_types,code'],
        ]);

        return DB::transaction(function () use ($data): JsonResponse {
            // Generate certificate number using SequenceNumberGenerator
            $certNumber = SequenceNumberGenerator::generate(
                Certificate::class,
                $data['policy_number'],
                5,
                $data['policy_number']
            );

            // Check if certificate already exists for this policy + closing
            $certificate = Certificate::firstOrNew([
                'policy_number' => $data['policy_number'],
                'closing_id' => $data['closing_id'],
            ]);

            $certificate->certificate_number = $certNumber;
            $certificate->period_from = $data['period_from'] ?? null;
            $certificate->period_to = $data['period_to'] ?? null;
            
            $closing = Closing::find($data['closing_id']);
            if ($closing) {
                $certificate->insurance_type_id = $closing->insurance_type_id;
                $certificate->insurance_type_code = $closing->insurance_type_code;
                $certificate->insurance_type_name = $closing->insurance_type_name;
            }

            $certificate->save();

            // Update closing's certificate_numbers field
            $closing = $certificate->closing;
            $existingCerts = $closing->certificates()->pluck('certificate_number')->toArray();
            $closing->update(['certificate_numbers' => implode(',', $existingCerts)]);

            return response()->json([
                'data' => $certificate,
                'message' => 'Certificate generated successfully',
            ]);
        });
    }

    public function store(): JsonResponse
    {
        $data = request()->validate([
            'policy_number' => ['required', 'string', 'exists:policies,policy_number'],
            'certificate_number' => ['nullable', 'string'],
            'closing_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:closings,id'],
            'period_from' => ['nullable', 'date:Y-m-d'],
            'period_to' => ['nullable', 'date:Y-m-d'],
            'insurance_type_code' => ['nullable', 'string'],
        ]);

        return DB::transaction(function () use ($data): JsonResponse {
            $certNumber = $data['certificate_number'];
            
            if (! $certNumber) {
                // Generate if not provided
                $certNumber = SequenceNumberGenerator::generate(
                    Certificate::class,
                    $data['policy_number'],
                    5,
                    $data['policy_number']
                );
            }

            $certificate = Certificate::create([
                'policy_number' => $data['policy_number'],
                'certificate_number' => $certNumber,
                'closing_id' => $data['closing_id'],
                'period_from' => $data['period_from'] ?? null,
                'period_to' => $data['period_to'] ?? null,
                'insurance_type_code' => $data['insurance_type_code'] ?? null,
            ]);

            // Update closing's certificate_numbers
            $closing = $certificate->closing;
            $existingCerts = $closing->certificates()->pluck('certificate_number')->toArray();
            $closing->update(['certificate_numbers' => implode(',', $existingCerts)]);

            return response()->json([
                'data' => $certificate,
                'message' => 'Certificate created successfully',
            ]);
        });
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Models\Transaction;

use App\Traits\HasBaseOwner;
use App\Traits\HasBaseTable;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;
use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;
use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;

class Certificate extends Model
{
    use HasBaseOwner, HasBaseTable, HasFactory, LogsActivity;

    protected $fillable = [
        'policy_number',
        'certificate_number',
        'period_from',
        'period_to',
        'insurance_type_id',
        'insurance_type_code',
        'insurance_type_name',
        'closing_id',
    ];

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults();
    }

    public function closing(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Closing::class, 'closing_id');
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api\Transaction;

use App\Http\Requests\Api\Transaction\ApiCertificateRequest;
use App\Models\Transaction\Certificate;
use App\Models\Transaction\Closing;
use App\Services\SequenceNumberGenerator;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class CertificateController
{
    public function generate(): JsonResponse
    {
        $data = request()->validate([
            'policy_number' => ['required', 'string', 'exists:policies,policy_number'],
            'closing_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:closings,id'],
            'period_from' => ['nullable', 'date:Y-m-d'],
            'period_to' => ['nullable', 'date:Y-m-d'],
            'insurance_type_code' => ['nullable', 'string', 'exists:insurance_types,code'],
        ]);

        return DB::transaction(function () use ($data): JsonResponse {
            // Generate certificate number using SequenceNumberGenerator
            $certNumber = SequenceNumberGenerator::generate(
                Certificate::class,
                $data['policy_number'],
                5,
                $data['policy_number']

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api\Transaction;

use App\Http\Requests\Api\Transaction\ApiCertificateRequest;
use App\Models\Transaction\Certificate;
use App\Models\Transaction\Closing;
use App\Services\SequenceNumberGenerator;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class CertificateController
{
    public function generate(): JsonResponse
    {
        $data = request()->validate([
            'policy_number' => ['required', 'string', 'exists:policies,policy_number'],
            'closing_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:closings,id'],
            'period_from' => ['nullable', 'date:Y-m-d'],
            'period_to' => ['nullable', 'date:Y-m-d'],
            'insurance_type_code' => ['nullable', 'string', 'exists:insurance_types,code'],
        ]);

        return DB::transaction(function () use ($data): JsonResponse {
            // Generate certificate number using SequenceNumberGenerator
            $certNumber = SequenceNumberGenerator::generate(
                Certificate::class,
                $data['policy_number'],
                5,
                $data['policy_number']
            );

            // Check if certificate already exists for this policy + closing
            $certificate = Certificate::firstOrNew([
                'policy_number' => $data['policy_number'],
                'closing_id' => $data['closing_id'],
            ]);

            $certificate->certificate_number = $certNumber;
            $certificate->period_from = $data['period_from'] ?? null;
            $certificate->period_to = $data['period_to'] ?? null;
            
            $closing = Closing::find($data['closing_id']);
            if ($closing) {
                $certificate->insurance_type_id = $closing->insurance_type_id;
                $certificate->insurance_type_code = $closing->insurance_type_code;
                $certificate->insurance_type_name = $closing->insurance_type_name;
            }

            $certificate->save();

            // Update closing's certificate_numbers field
            $closing = $certificate->closing;
            $existingCerts = $closing->certificates()->pluck('certificate_number')->toArray();
            $closing->update(['certificate_numbers' => implode(',', $existingCerts)]);

            return response()->json([
                'data' => $certificate,
                'message' => 'Certificate generated successfully',
            ]);
        });
    }

    public function store(): JsonResponse
    {
        $data = request()->validate([
            'policy_number' => ['required', 'string', 'exists:policies,policy_number'],
            'certificate_number' => ['nullable', 'string'],
            'closing_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:closings,id'],
            'period_from' => ['nullable', 'date:Y-m-d'],
            'period_to' => ['nullable', 'date:Y-m-d'],
            'insurance_type_code' => ['nullable', 'string'],
        ]);

        return DB::transaction(function () use ($data): JsonResponse {
            $certNumber = $data['certificate_number'];
            
            if (! $certNumber) {
                // Generate if not provided
                $certNumber = SequenceNumberGenerator::generate(
                    Certificate::class,
                    $data['policy_number'],
                    5,
                    $data['policy_number']
                );
            }

            $certificate = Certificate::create([
                'policy_number' => $data['policy_number'],
                'certificate_number' => $certNumber,
                'closing_id' => $data['closing_id'],
                'period_from' => $data['period_from'] ?? null,
                'period_to' => $data['period_to'] ?? null,
                'insurance_type_code' => $data['insurance_type_code'] ?? null,
            ]);

            // Update closing's certificate_numbers
            $closing = $certificate->closing;
            $existingCerts = $closing->certificates()->pluck('certificate_number')->toArray();
            $closing->update(['certificate_numbers' => implode(',', $existingCerts)]);

            return response()->json([
                'data' => $certificate,
                'message' => 'Certificate created successfully',
            ]);
        });
    }
}
